title: Redundant modifiers should be avoided
description: Redundant modifiers should not be usedAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode SmellQuick FixIDE quick fixes available with SonarQube for IDEunusedfindingclumsyWhy is this an issue?Unnecessary keywords simply clutter the code and should be removed. Specifically:partialon type declarations that are completely defined in one placesealedon members ofsealedclassesunsafemethod or block inside construct already marked withunsafe, or when there are nounsafeconstructs in the blockcheckedanduncheckedblocks with no integral-type arithmetic operationsNoncompliant code examplepublic partial class MyClass // Noncompliant { public virtual void Method() { } } public sealed class MyOtherClass : MyClass { public sealed override void Method() // Noncompliant { } }Compliant solutionpublic cla
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

logic.detection_conditions: Regex detects redundant or contradictory modifiers in interfaces, sealed/static classes, and duplicate/contradictory modifiers.
logic.triggering_conditions: Pattern matches redundant or contradictory modifiers.
exclusion_conditions: Valid modifier combinations (public static, protected virtual)
